messages.text: Mario Mania benefits March of Dimes!
$5 can support newborn screenings through March of Dimes Advocacy.
$10 can help fund programs to help pregnant people quit smoking.
$25 can provide quality healthcare to 2,400 women each year.
100% of your donations go directly to March of Dimes!
1 in 10 babies is born preterm each year.
2 women die each day from pregnancy-related causes.
